persona.description: A careful shopper who repeatedly weighs price and value before engaging.

behavior_description: 0-2s: The shopper stops at the display and reaches toward the product. 2-5s: The shopper touches the accessible demo item on the open tray, releases it, then reaches for it again. 5-8s: The shopper repeats the handling motion while studying the item closely with hands visible. 8-10s: The shopper leaves the demo item on the tray and remains undecided.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper stops at the display and reaches toward the product.
The shopper touches the accessible demo item on the open tray, releases it, then reaches for it again.
The shopper repeats the handling motion while studying the item closely with hands visible.
The shopper leaves the demo item on the tray and remains undecided.

kling_prompt_sections.camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a skincare aisle with soft shelf lighting; visible product setup: an accessible demo sample on an open presentation tray on top of the counter, outside any glass case; the shopper can naturally touch only this demo sample, while the enclosed display stays in the background.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper stops at the display and reaches toward the product.
The shopper touches the accessible demo item on the open tray, releases it, then reaches for it again.
The shopper repeats the handling motion while studying the item closely with hands visible.
The shopper leaves the demo item on the tray and remains undecided.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
Scene: a skincare aisle with soft shelf lighting; visible product setup: an accessible demo sample on an open presentation tray on top of the counter, outside any glass case; the shopper can naturally touch only this demo sample, while the enclosed display stays in the background.
Customer behavior style: The shopper stays near the display and examines details with visible curiosity.
Behavior timeline:
- 0-2s: The shopper stops at the display and reaches toward the product.
- 2-5s: The shopper touches the accessible demo item on the open tray, releases it, then reaches for it again.
- 5-8s: The shopper repeats the handling motion while studying the item closely with hands visible.
- 8-10s: The shopper leaves the demo item on the tray and remains undecided.
Negative constraints: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.
